assertions.assertion: A class implementing IClientStore is created with constructor parameters for a DbContext and ITenantContext (or equivalent tenant resolver)
assertions.rationale: TenantAwareClientStore implements IClientStore with AppDbContext and ITenantContext in the constructor

assertions.assertion: FindClientByIdAsync applies a Where filter that includes both the clientId parameter AND the tenant identifier from ITenantContext
The store is registered using AddClientStore<T>() on the IdentityServer builder, not directly via AddTransient
assertions.rationale: Uses builder.Services.AddTransient<IClientStore, TenantAwareClientStore>() instead of the Duende helper method AddClientStore<T>()

assertions.assertion: An ITenantContext interface (or equivalent) is defined or referenced that exposes the current tenant identifier
assertions.rationale: Defines ITenantContext interface with TenantId property
